settings.title: Mobility and Movement
settings.summary: Targeted work to free up stiff hips, shoulders, and ankles for people who sit most of the day.
settings.description:
Tight joints make every lift harder and most days less comfortable. This session focuses on the ranges you have lost and the control you need to keep them, which matters most for people who sit for a living.

What we work on

We combine guided stretching, loaded mobility drills, and breathing work, then send you home with a short routine you can fit into ten minutes. The loaded drills are key; gaining range is one thing, but being able to use and control it is what actually carries over to lifting and daily life.

  • Targeted work for stiff hips, shoulders, and ankles
  • Loaded drills so new range comes with control
  • A short home routine that fits into ten minutes

Stiff hips, shoulders, and ankles are the usual culprits for people at a desk, so that is where we tend to spend our time. We adjust the focus based on what feels restricted for you on the day.

Who it suits

It pairs well with strength training or stands on its own if comfort and ease of movement are your main goal right now. Beginners and experienced lifters alike get something from it.

Wear clothing you can move freely in and come ready to work without expecting to be sore afterwards. The home routine matters more than any single session, so building it into your day is where the real progress comes from.
